proxy-host.description: Proxy server hostname or IP address

https-port.description: Proxy server HTTPS port(HTTP port will be used if not configured)

encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED secret string)

greater-trustworthy.description: Reputation score is greater than or equal to 81

greater-low-risk.description: Reputation score is greater than or equal to 61

greater-moderate-risk.description: Reputation score is greater than or equal to 41

greater-suspicious.description: Reputation score is greater than or equal to 21

greater-malicious.description: Reputation score is greater than or equal to 1

greater-threshold.description: Reputation score is greater than or equal to the customized score (1-100)

less-trustworthy.description: Reputation score is less than or equal to 100

less-low-risk.description: Reputation score is less than or equal to 80

less-moderate-risk.description: Reputation score is less than or equal to 60

less-suspicious.description: Reputation score is less than or equal to 40

less-malicious.description: Reputation score is less than or equal to 20

less-threshold.description: Reputation score is less than or equal to a customized value (1-100)

cloud-query-disable.description: Disables cloud queries for URL's not present in local database(default enable)

cloud-query-cache-size.description: Maximum cache size for storing cloud query results

db-update-time.description: Time of day to update database (default: 00:00)

rtu-update-interval.description: Interval to check for real time updates if enabled in mins(default 60)

rtu-cache-size.description: Maximum cache size for storing RTU updates

use-mgmt-port.description: Use management interface for all communication with BrightCloud

remote-syslog-enable.description: Enable data plane logging to a remote syslog server

online-check-disable.description: Disables online queries for license. By default it is enabled.
